scenario.name: Basic registration
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 10 Expires: 120 User-Agent: SIPp/3smi Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port] [field1] Max-Forwards: 10 Expires: 120 User-Agent: SIPp/3smi Content-Length: 0
